documents.title: Employee Onboarding Guide
documents.body: Welcome to the company. This onboarding guide walks new hires through account setup, benefits enrollment, and first-week expectations. Contact the HR team for your equipment and building access badge.

documents.title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
documents.body: Employees may submit business expenses for reimbursement within 30 days. Travel, meals, and software subscriptions require a receipt and manager approval before payment is processed by finance.

documents.title: VPN and Remote Access Setup
documents.body: To work remotely, install the VPN client and authenticate with your single sign-on credentials. This security guide covers multi-factor authentication and troubleshooting common connection errors.

documents.title: Q1 2026 Revenue Report
documents.body: ACME Corp reported strong quarterly revenue growth driven by the European market, with the Berlin office leading new enterprise contracts. Finance will publish the detailed breakdown next week.

documents.title: Kubernetes Deployment Runbook
documents.body: This engineering runbook describes how to deploy services to the production Kubernetes cluster, roll back a bad release, and read pod logs. Always run the smoke tests after a deployment.

documents.title: Company Town Hall Announcement
documents.body: Join the all-hands town hall this Friday. Leadership will share the product roadmap, celebrate recent wins, and answer employee questions live. A recording will be posted afterward.
